message:
test,feat(integration): upgrade to signed capability tokens in all integration tests

Refactor all integration test invoke builders to generate live
Ed25519-signed capability tokens instead of test fixtures. This
enables end-to-end verification of capability-based authorization.

- Add build_live_capability_token() helper for token generation
- Add capability_public_key_hex() for environment setup
- Add build_host_preflight_request() for preflight construction
- Spawn host with FCP_HOST_CAPABILITY_PUBLIC_KEY env var
- Add test: preflight denies missing capability token
- Update all existing tests to use crypto infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
